# Module Name

## Owns

- Responsibilities owned by this module.

## Does Not Own

- Responsibilities that must stay in other modules.

## Public Interfaces

- Domain interfaces, hooks, routes, or adapters other modules may use.

## Dependencies

- Allowed dependencies.
- Disallowed dependencies.

## Documentation

- ADRs.
- Architecture docs.
- QA docs.
- Study notes, if this module is used for learning.
